task_completion.description: Open the sensitivity_study.ork file in OpenRocket
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket application window is visible, and the title bar or file menu indicates that 'sensitivity_study.ork' is loaded.

task_completion.description: Configure three flight simulations with time steps of 0.1s, 0.05s, and 0.01s
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight simulations' tab in OpenRocket shows multiple simulations, and simulation edit dialogs ('Simulation options' -> 'Time step') show values of 0.1, 0.05, and 0.01 seconds.

task_completion.description: Export time-series flight data as CSV files
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Export data' dialog in OpenRocket is visible with 'Time', 'Altitude', and 'Acceleration' selected, OR a file manager/terminal shows at least three CSV files located in '/home/ga/Documents/exports/'.
The OpenRocket window title shows 'sensitivity_study.ork' without an asterisk (*) indicating unsaved changes, or a save action/dialog is visible.

task_completion.description: Create a sensitivity report evaluating the maximum acceleration
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) is open showing a file named 'sensitivity_report.txt' in '/home/ga/Documents/exports/'. The file content must list maximum acceleration values for the three time steps and include a brief evaluation of the sensitivity.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to configure simulations and export data
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the OpenRocket application interface (simulation tabs, export dialogs) rather than just terminal commands or mock file creation.

integrity.description: The CSV files were genuinely exported from the simulation
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of the OpenRocket export dialog being used, or the CSV files containing actual comma-separated numerical data corresponding to flight time, altitude, and acceleration.

integrity.description: The sensitivity report contains actual simulation results
integrity.visual_evidence: The maximum acceleration values in the report appear to be specific numerical results derived from the simulations, not generic placeholders or copied text from the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The rocket file is located at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/sensitivity_study.ork. The agent must create simulations with time steps of 0.1, 0.05, and 0.01 seconds. The exported CSV files and the sensitivity_report.txt must be saved in /home/ga/Documents/exports/. The report must list the maximum acceleration for each simulation.
